MINI MINUTES: This cause came on this dates regularly scheduled calendar. Present:Commissioner:Loretta M. Norris, Clerk:John Stokes, Reporter:Mitch Lyon. All parties present. Plaintiff represented byCatherine Wong, Esq.Defendant's actual true name is Alex Wang. Mandarin interpreter Ling Miao sworn. Plaintiff Jian Ren Chen sworn and examined. Judgment as follows: $50,000.00 Compensatory damages, $50,000.00 punitive damages, Costs $633.37. Judgment filed in open court.
